title: Lummy Ticket
description: NFT-based decentralized ticketing platform built on the Lisk blockchain with anti-scalping features. Led end-to-end product development as CTO, managing a 4-person team and securing USD 4,600 grant funding through the Lisk Spark Incubator.
content:
# Lummy Ticket

NFT-based decentralized ticketing platform on the Lisk blockchain.

## Highlights
- Anti-scalping smart contracts
- End-to-end product development as CTO
- Lisk Spark Incubator graduate (USD 4,600 grant)
- Top 5 Winner of Lisk Builders Challenge Round One
